intended_use: The Peerbridge Cor™ System family of products is intended to capture and transmit symptomatic events and continuous external electrocardiogram (ECG) information for 24 hours and up to 7 days (long ter
intended_use_full: The Peerbridge Cor™ System family of products is intended to capture and transmit symptomatic events and continuous external electrocardiogram (ECG) information for 24 hours and up to 7 days (long term monitoring). It is indicated for use on adult patients 18 years or older who may be asymptomatic or who may suffer from transient symptoms such as palpitations, shortness of breath, dizziness, light-headedness, pre-syncope, fatigue, or anxiety.
target_condition: Transient cardiac symptoms including palpitations, shortness of breath, dizziness, light-headedness, pre-syncope, syncope, and fatigue
